## Privacy checklist

- [ ] No real financial data
- [ ] No screenshots with real data
- [ ] No `data/`, `config.json`, logs, exports, zips, PDFs, or bank CSVs
- [ ] No API keys, bearer tokens, account numbers, emails, or private paths
